channel.description: Connect to Firebase (settings -> Firebase) Security concern! Remove access afterwards https://console.firebase.google.com/ takes a while generate config files package name “edu.ksu.mc565.russfeld.todoapp” or similar Deploy settings (Connect -> Firestore -> Settings) Auth Once Firebase is connected, enable auth Get started - choose providers Selected Email/Password, no email link Storage - not available for free Data Priority Enum Collections Create a users collection - needs uid Create a a todo collection - needs uid Create Pages
